seoTitle: Kerry vs Kewarra Beach — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Kerry and Kewarra Beach. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Kerry vs Kewarra Beach: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kerry and Kewarra Beach.
heading: Kerry vs Kewarra Beach — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kerry, Queensland and Kewarra Beach, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kewarra Beach has a lower overall climate risk score (28/100) compared to Kerry (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kerry or Kewarra Beach safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kerry has a flood risk score of 21/100, while Kewarra Beach scores 27/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kerry scores 32/100 for bushfire risk. Kewarra Beach scores 27/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kerry or Kewarra Beach?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kewarra Beach has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.6% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
